title: murdannia angustifolia
intro: Murdannia angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Murdannia or Narrow-leaved Marsh Dayflower, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Murdannia angustifolia is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in topical applications for skin conditions and wounds.
